title: philotheca coateana
intro: Philotheca coateana is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly known as the White Coral Peppermint Bush. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its essential oils. The health benefits of Philotheca coateana include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and skin conditions such as acne and eczema. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infused oils, which can be used topically or internally to promote overall well-being.
